headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Underperform on Aflac, Raises Price Target to $115
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Thomas Gallagher   maintains Aflac (NYSE:AFL) with a Underperform and raises the price target from $109 to $115.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Aflac, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Ryan Krueger   maintains Aflac (NYSE:AFL) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $115 to $120.
